# Canonical realm-role GPU argv snapshot generated by:
#   cargo test -p d2b-host --lib gpu_argv::tests::daemon_input_snapshot_line -- --nocapture
# Source: packages/d2b-host/src/gpu_argv.rs::tests::daemon_input()
#
# Pins for the pinned gpu_argv unit-test parity gate:
#   - argv[0..3]: <crosvm> device gpu
#   - role-local GPU and Wayland sockets under the owning realm/workload root
#   - allocator-delivered render-node FD fixed at /proc/self/fd/10
#   - --params cross-domain Wayland: context-types virgl:virgl2:cross-domain,
#     one hidden display, egl=true, vulkan=true
# The allocator grants the shared render-node resource before this role starts.
/nix/store/AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA-crosvm-127.0/bin/crosvm device gpu --socket /run/d2b/r/tft6a4n527flrfmxjwna/w/ucvmyzodoxhnswumcjsa/roles/lindrso5iyyzzdrghemq/gpu.sock --wayland-sock /run/d2b/r/tft6a4n527flrfmxjwna/w/ucvmyzodoxhnswumcjsa/roles/z4kayxxlmcmxc4m3s4ga/wayland-0 --gpu-device-node /proc/self/fd/10 --params {"context-types":"virgl:virgl2:cross-domain","displays":[{"hidden":true}],"egl":true,"vulkan":true}
